How do I benefit from staking?

Gas refund

Get up to 95% of gas expenses refunded, depending on your stake size Under this program, 1INCH tokens are distributed as gas refund to Ethereum users who stake 1INCH tokens through the 1inch dApp.

Gas refund

Get up to 95% of gas expenses refunded, depending on your stake size Under this program, 1INCH tokens are distributed as gas refund to Ethereum users who stake 1INCH tokens through the 1inch dApp.
